title: Halo 3
notes: test

reports.notes: test
test
Low FPS, but can start and play campaign, important note, if you die you can get stuck in a cutscene loop.
Crashes upon launch ping the game.
Can play in campaign, frequently drops in FPS but seems to sit around 11-19 range. As described by another user you will need to select mission to bypass the initial cutscene which loops.

Campaign cutscene cannot transition into gameplay in at least the first level. Workaround is to hit A to skip loop it once, back out, and start  the actual first mission from the campaign menu. 

Performance is about 15fps on iPhone 17.

Playable, a few minor FPS drops intermittently, minor graphical glitches that functionally still manage to fit the aesthetic of the game.

title: Halo 3: ODST
notes: Game boots however menu loads very distorted with heavy graphic bugs. Campaign loads intro scene but gets stuck in a loop. Could not navigate menu successfully to bypass loop.

title: skate.
notes: After restarting the game several times the game finally launched and put me in the menu. I couldn’t get into a game tho so I couldn’t actually skate just the menu worked. And also most of the time the game was stuck on a endless loading screen when trying to get to the game menu

title: Beautiful Katamari
notes: Game boots and loads quickly and smoothly with some graphical glitches during cutscenes. This game has experienced a regression from previous version and now freezes at varying points after loading the menu where as I was able to get into and play the game at about 3/4 speed on initial version.
